StepItem.Name: Start Operation mode monitornig in Parallel Thread
Start Operation mode monitornig in Parallel Thread
Send the signal that Parallel sequence needs to finish
2.1.1 Power consumption of the PCB with motor
Connect Positive half wave to TP3
Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
Connect Negative half wave to TP3
Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
4,1,6 Turn Pot P3 in Middle position
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read first value
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read and compare 1
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read and compare 2
4.1.8 Encoder G1 Reg 13 Read and compare
4.1.9.1 Confirm Turn on DIS1 with Reg 26
4.1.9.3 Confirm Turn off DIS1 with Reg 26
4.1.9.4 Confirm Start of Display routine Reg 27
4.1.9.4 Confirm Start of Display routine Reg 27
4.1.9.6 Confirm Stop of Display routine Reg 27
4.1.10.1 Confirm Turn on LED D8 Reg 24
4.1.10.3 Confirm Turn off LED D8 Reg 24
4.1.12.1 Read setting of the engine speed Reg4
4.1.12.4 Check if Engine is running CW
4.1.12.3 Read Hall sensor Running Reg 25 Initial
4.1.12.6 Read Hall sensor Stop Reg 25 Initial
Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
Disconnect Positive half wave to TP3
5.1.1 Check if Serial Numebr is in memory
Inform operator that system is in autoamtic mode
2.1.1 Power consumption of the PCB with motor
Start Operation mode monitornig in Parallel Thread
Send the signal that Parallel sequence needs to finish
2.1.1 Power consumption of the PCB with motor
2.2.4 DC Voltage U_MOT TP5 with Load
2.2.6 DC Voltage Monitoring of thermal triggers TP13
4.1.1 Check if Engine is running CW
4.1.4 Check if Engine is running CW
Inform operator that system is in autoamtic mode
